description: TickTick MCP server for task management and to-do list operations.

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Tool requests broad permissions (exec/fs/network). Validate input parameters using Enums where possible, and restrict file system operations to explicit allowed directories.

findings.title: DoS Resilience — Missing Rate Limit / Timeout
findings.description: tool performs network or execution operations but declares no rate-limit, timeout, or retry configuration
findings.recommendation: Declare explicit rate-limit, timeout, and retry configuration for all network and execution tools. Implement exponential back-off and surface resource state to the calling agent.

findings.title: Tool Shadowing
findings.description: tool name "TICKTICK_OAUTH2_AUTHORIZATION_STEP_1" duplicates "TICKTICK_OAUTH2_AUTHORIZATION_STEP1" already registered in this tool set — a malicious server can shadow a trusted tool by registering an identical name
findings.recommendation: Two or more tools registered in your MCP environment share an identical or near-identical name. A malicious server can shadow a trusted tool this way, intercepting calls you intend for the legitimate tool. Remove the conflicting server or rename its tools to be unambiguous.
